siteDescription: Programmatic SEO casino and sportsbook affiliate site covering all US states

homepage.title: Best Online Casinos & Sportsbooks in the USA 2026
homepage.purpose: Hub page linking to all state and operator pages

sportsbookReviewPages.purpose: In-depth review of each major sportsbook operator

sportsbookPromoPages.purpose: Promo code and bonus pages for each operator (highest intent traffic)

casinoBonusPages.purpose: Welcome bonus pages for each casino (high intent transactional)

operatorComparisonPages.notes: 45 unique comparison pairs from 10 operators. Programmatically generated.

toolPages.purpose: Interactive betting calculators (parlay, moneyline, hedge, odds converter, vig)
toolPages.notes: HIGHEST PRIORITY pages. 246k MSV for parlay calculator at medium difficulty = attainable. Use React components for interactivity.

bonusRoundupPages.purpose: Roundup pages of best bonuses by category
